summary: plain-event-envelope publish chain 已在 live server 上成立：通过 POST /api/v1/presence => 200、api 日志 event_published presence.updated、以及 groups events API 中出现 presence.updated 事件完成闭环。join 仍然可用：GET /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby => 200，POST /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby/join => 200，且 recent api logs 无 MissingGreenlet。最终哈希状态：web.py 与 console.py 匹配目标；event_bus.py=049D1F9322BEDAEE830B965BBE1C66C622375CDAE1E9C111A6FB07EC7BF00BAC 与目标不符，community.py=F71EEC86327847206E90BFDA07EDB6B4F1AA5092CFC45831A59AAAAB34115BAC 与目标不符。因此系统尚未 ready for next integration stage。
blocker: event_bus.py 与 community.py 仍未对齐到要求的目标哈希，因此目标部署身份未完全对齐。
tests: groups events API contains presence.updated events 54006/54007/54008 with final note
recent api logs contain event_published presence.updated and no MissingGreenlet
